prose.title: 11b mos
prose.body: The 11B MOS stands for Infantryman in the United States Army. Infantrymen are the backbone of the Army's land combat force, specializing in the use of small arms, explosives, and various infantry tactics. They are responsible for engaging and defeating the enemy in close combat situations, conducting patrols, providing security, and defending the front lines. Infantrymen are vital to the success of military operations and serve an essential role in ensuring the safety and security of their fellow soldiers and the mission.
